channel.title: +Battle tactics on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Battle tactics on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Coordination
item.description: Modern warfare is about combined arms. Tanks, infantry, helicopters, artillery, etc. are all vulnerable if employed by themselves. Using them together is how you mitigate their vulnerabilities. Artillery strikes on fortified positions aren’t that effective unless there is an advancing ground element. Full regiments The Russian armed forces likely have few or no full-strength units in reserve to deploy to fight in Ukraine because of a flawed mobilization scheme that cannot be fixed in the course of a short war.

item.title: Overall Evolution
item.description: Plain battle Early infrantry with formations and stampede tactics Infantry supplemented by War chariots using small chariots (which could attack infantry from the sides). Infantry (thick formation) supplemented by cavalry (a thin line). Hunnic, Turkic, Mongol mounted archer blitzers who harrassed infantry till they broke formation and lost. Infantry and cavalry supplemented by Artillery

item.title: Particular battles
item.description: Battle of cannae [YT] Great flanking and feinting.
